content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally with Nifty +0.74%, IT +1.99%, Pharma +2.47%, Auto +1.47%, Metal +1.83%, Power/Energy +1.43% — breadth is strong and VIX is down 5%. Book is already 60% deployed with multiple power/energy and FMCG positions running, plus three pending CNC LIMIT orders open. Priority is managing existing book (trail SLs on winners, manage HUL into Apr 30 earnings) rather than chasing more breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock recovering from -2.7% to -2.6%. Strong Q4 (PAT +35%, NNPA 0.13%) intact, just sector rotation lag today (PSU bank +0.27%). CMP 79.18 vs SL 76.50 = ~3.4% buffer. Thesis intact, no MODIFY warranted yet (loss position, can't tighten SL above entry without trailing logic on a loser). HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+6.5% unrealized gain; current SL 1029.20 is already above entry 984. CMP 1048 has pulled back from 1060 high. Loosening SL slightly to 1020 would be a no-op rejection (can't loosen). Keeping SL at 1029.20 locks in ~4.6% profit. Actually keeping current SL — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Marginally negative -0.4%. Held as portfolio hedge ahead of Fed FOMC Apr 29-30. SL 119 (~4.5% below CMP) appropriate for ETF. Hold through event."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Already at SL 1418 above entry 1412.94 = effectively breakeven+. CMP 1426. Same values — actually this is a no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "-1.3% unrealized; Apr 30 Q4 earnings is binary risk in 3 days. SL 2295 is ~2% below CMP 2335 — appropriate buffer. Research notes accumulation signs (delivery +47%, OI rising). Hold into earnings; SL handles downside if results disappoint."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL is already at 405 (above entry 404.50 = breakeven). CMP 410.20, +1.6%. Same as stored — no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Just entered today, -0.4%. Stock already ran +6% intraday before our entry, now consolidating. SL 1760 (~2.3% below CMP 1802) is appropriate. Q4 results May 13 catalyst ahead. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, -0.2%. Organon acquisition catalyst, pharma sector leading +2.47%. SL 1685 (~2.8% below CMP 1734) is fine. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry 320.50, CMP 321.20, +0.2%. Tightening SL from 312 to 315 (~1.9% below CMP) to better protect capital given stock is near 52w high (323 resistance) where pullback risk is elevated. Locks in tighter risk on a stock just barely above entry. Risk on position now: 150 × (321.2-315) = ~Rs 930, vs original Rs 1380. Still within 0.5% portfolio risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 23.65 from earlier — not duplicating per ORDER HYGIENE rules. Letting it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 612 — not duplicating. Stock has likely run higher; will let pending order expire naturally if not filled."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 443 — not duplicating. Power cluster already heavy in book (NTPC, TORNTPOWER, POWERGRID = 3 power names). Cluster discipline says no more power adds even if it fills. Letting it work but won't chase."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact; sector laggard today. SL 76.50 with ~3.4% buffer is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1029.20, above entry 984, locking in ~4.6% gain. Per trailing rules with +6.5% gain and SL already past breakeven, structure is already good. Will trail further if it pushes past 1080."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; ETF; awaiting Fed FOMC outcome."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already above entry 1412.94 — breakeven+ locked in. Stock at all-time high; will trail higher if it pushes past 1450."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Apr 30 binary earnings event. SL 2295 (2% below CMP) is the protection. Don't widen, don't tighten — let earnings decide."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 405 already at breakeven (entry 404.50). +1.6% unrealized. Will trail to ~407 if push past 415."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered today; -0.4%. SL 1760 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered; -0.2%. Wide-volatility stock post-Organon news, SL 1685 has appropriate 2.8% buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 312 to 315 — stock is at 52w-high resistance (323) with reversal risk; want to cut losses tighter on minimal-conviction breakout entry."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "M&MFIN (Q4 +55%, momentum) and INDUSINDBK (turnaround) remain interesting but I am NOT adding more financials given the book has MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING already. SAIL/JSWSTEEL — metals strong but no edge over already-pending HINDZINC. IKS volume surge is on M&A news already priced; pass. AXISBANK weak, no entry. ANANTRAJ realty extension — pass, lower conviction.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed across 9 holdings with 3 pending orders that could push deployment past 75%. No room for new entries — focus is purely position management. Power cluster (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER) is at the cluster-risk limit per protocol; will not add more power names. FMCG cluster (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) faces binary HUL earnings Apr 30 — sized appropriately. Performance stats show 11% win rate which is poor; need to reduce trade count and hold quality setups longer. Today is a managing day, not a buying day."
}
